artifacts.command:
ROCR_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 VLLM_LOGGING_LEVEL=INFO bash -lc '
    set -euo pipefail
    PORT=31000
    MODEL=/home/homelab1/datapool/ai_models/safetensors/Qwen/Qwen3-14B-FP8
    SERVER_LOG=benchmarks/results/2026-06-30/sglang/logs/sglang-r9700-qwen3-14b-fp8-smoke-pp16-tg8-tp1-rocr.server.log
    RESULT=benchmarks/results/2026-06-30/sglang/logs/sglang-r9700-qwen3-14b-fp8-smoke-pp16-tg8-tp1-rocr.result.jsonl
    rm -f "$RESULT" "$SERVER_LOG"
    build/envs/sglang-rocm/bin/python -m sglang.launch_server \
      --model-path "$MODEL" \
      --host 127.0.0.1 \
      --port "$PORT" \
      --tp-size 1 \
      --pp-size 1 \
      --context-length 256 \
      --max-total-tokens 4096 \
      --mem-fraction-static 0.75 \
      --dtype auto \
      --kv-cache-dtype auto \
      --attention-backend triton \
      --sampling-backend pytorch \
      --fp8-gemm-backend triton \
      --disable-cuda-graph \
      > "$SERVER_LOG" 2>&1 &
    server_pid=$!
    cleanup() {
      kill "$server_pid" 2>/dev/null || true
      wait "$server_pid" 2>/dev/null || true
    }
    trap cleanup EXIT
    for _ in $(seq 1 420); do
      if ! kill -0 "$server_pid" 2>/dev/null; then
        echo "SGLang server exited before readiness" >&2
        tail -200 "$SERVER_LOG" >&2 || true
        exit 1
      fi
      if curl -sf "http://127.0.0.1:${PORT}/health" >/dev/null; then
        break
      fi
      sleep 1
    done
    curl -sf "http://127.0.0.1:${PORT}/health" >/dev/null
    build/envs/sglang-rocm/bin/python -m sglang.benchmark.serving \
      --backend sglang \
      --base-url "http://127.0.0.1:${PORT}" \
      --model "$MODEL" \
      --tokenizer "$MODEL" \
      --dataset-name random \
      --num-prompts 1 \
      --random-input-len 16 \
      --random-output-len 8 \
      --request-rate inf \
      --disable-tqdm \
      --output-file "$RESULT"
  '

notes: sgl-kernel was locally patched to allow experimental gfx1201 build

artifacts.command:
ROCR_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 VLLM_LOGGING_LEVEL=INFO bash -lc '
    set -euo pipefail
    PORT=31001
    MODEL=/home/homelab1/datapool/ai_models/safetensors/Qwen/Qwen3-14B-FP8
    SERVER_LOG=benchmarks/results/2026-06-30/sglang/logs/sglang-r9700-qwen3-14b-fp8-smoke-pp16-tg8-tp1-rocr-noaiter.server.log
    RESULT=benchmarks/results/2026-06-30/sglang/logs/sglang-r9700-qwen3-14b-fp8-smoke-pp16-tg8-tp1-rocr-noaiter.result.jsonl
    rm -f "$RESULT" "$SERVER_LOG"
    build/envs/sglang-rocm/bin/python -m sglang.launch_server \
      --model-path "$MODEL" \
      --host 127.0.0.1 \
      --port "$PORT" \
      --tp-size 1 \
      --pp-size 1 \
      --context-length 256 \
      --max-total-tokens 4096 \
      --mem-fraction-static 0.75 \
      --dtype auto \
      --kv-cache-dtype auto \
      --attention-backend triton \
      --sampling-backend pytorch \
      --fp8-gemm-backend triton \
      --disable-cuda-graph \
      > "$SERVER_LOG" 2>&1 &
    server_pid=$!
    cleanup() {
      kill "$server_pid" 2>/dev/null || true
      wait "$server_pid" 2>/dev/null || true
    }
    trap cleanup EXIT
    for _ in $(seq 1 300); do
      if ! kill -0 "$server_pid" 2>/dev/null; then
        echo "SGLang server exited before readiness" >&2
        tail -200 "$SERVER_LOG" >&2 || true
        exit 1
      fi
      if grep -q "Segfault encountered" "$SERVER_LOG"; then
        echo "SGLang server hit segfault before readiness" >&2
        tail -200 "$SERVER_LOG" >&2 || true
        exit 1
      fi
      if curl -sf "http://127.0.0.1:${PORT}/health" >/dev/null; then
        break
      fi
      sleep 1
    done
    curl -sf "http://127.0.0.1:${PORT}/health" >/dev/null
    build/envs/sglang-rocm/bin/python -m sglang.benchmark.serving \
      --backend sglang \
      --base-url "http://127.0.0.1:${PORT}" \
      --model "$MODEL" \
      --tokenizer "$MODEL" \
      --dataset-name random \
      --num-prompts 1 \
      --random-input-len 16 \
      --random-output-len 8 \
      --request-rate inf \
      --disable-tqdm \
      --output-file "$RESULT"
  '

notes: sgl-kernel was locally patched to allow experimental gfx1201 build
